formulas.name: Bottleneck Identification

variables.capacity: Units per time for each stage

formulas.description: The bottleneck is the stage (resource) with the minimum capacity

formulas.name: Process Capacity
formulas.description: Overall system capacity equals the bottleneck capacity

formulas.name: Flow Rate
formulas.formula: Flow rate = min(demand rate, process capacity)
formulas.description: System operates at the lower of demand or capacity

formulas.name: Utilization
formulas.description: Percentage of time a resource is busy

formulas.name: Cycle Time
formulas.description: Time between successive completions

formulas.name: Throughput Rate
formulas.description: Rate at which work gets done

formulas.name: Little's Law
formulas.description: Fundamental relationship between flow rate, time, and inventory

formulas.name: Queue Length
formulas.description: Little's Law applied to queue only

formulas.name: System Inventory
formulas.description: Little's Law applied to entire system

formulas.name: Utilization (Queueing)
formulas.description: Server utilization in queueing systems

formulas.name: Waiting Time

variables.Ca: Coefficient of variation of interarrival times
variables.Cs: Coefficient of variation of processing times

formulas.description: P-K formula for single server waiting time

formulas.name: Total Time
formulas.description: Total time in system

formulas.name: Queue Length
formulas.description: Average number waiting in line

formulas.name: System Inventory
formulas.description: Average number in line and being served

formulas.name: Utilization
formulas.description: Fraction of time server is busy

formulas.name: Utilization Effect
formulas.description: Magnification factor due to utilization

formulas.name: Coefficient of Variation (Arrivals)
formulas.description: Relative variability of arrivals

formulas.name: Coefficient of Variation (Service)
formulas.description: Relative variability of service times

formulas.name: Variance Effect
formulas.description: Magnification factor due to variability

formulas.name: Waiting Time (Multi-server)
formulas.description: P-K formula for multi-server systems

formulas.name: System Utilization
formulas.description: Utilization across all servers

formulas.name: Average Processing Time (All Servers)
formulas.description: Effective processing rate with multiple servers

formulas.name: Utilization Effect Exponent
formulas.description: Exponent for multi-server utilization effect

formulas.name: Utilization Effect (Multi-server)
formulas.description: Multi-server utilization magnification factor

formulas.name: Total Relevant Cost (Current Q)

variables.S: Fixed cost of placing an order ($)
variables.H: Holding cost per unit per year ($/unit/year)

formulas.description: Annual cost of ordering and holding inventory

formulas.name: Holding Cost

variables.H: Total holding cost per unit per year
variables.h: Physical holding cost per unit per year ($)

formulas.description: Total annual cost to hold one unit in inventory

formulas.name: Economic Order Quantity

variables.H: Holding cost per unit per year ($/unit/year)

formulas.description: Order quantity that minimizes total relevant cost

formulas.name: Total Cost at EOQ

variables.H: Holding cost per unit per year

formulas.description: Minimum possible total relevant cost

formulas.name: Procurement Cost (EOQ)
formulas.description: Annual ordering cost at EOQ

formulas.name: Holding Cost (EOQ)

variables.H: Holding cost per unit per year

formulas.description: Annual holding cost at EOQ

formulas.name: Percent Savings

variables.TC(Q): Total cost using current order quantity

formulas.description: Percentage cost reduction from using EOQ

formulas.name: Overage Cost
formulas.description: Loss per unit ordered but not sold

formulas.name: Underage Cost
formulas.description: Lost profit per unit of unmet demand

formulas.name: Critical Fractile
formulas.description: Optimal service level that balances overage and underage costs

formulas.name: Optimal Order Quantity
formulas.description: Order quantity that maximizes expected profit

formulas.name: Optimal Order Quantity (z-score)
formulas.description: Alternative formula using z-score

formulas.name: Service Level for Given Q
formulas.formula: Service Level = NORM.DIST(Q, μ, σ, TRUE)
formulas.description: Probability that demand ≤ Q

formulas.name: Z-score Calculation
formulas.description: Standardized distance from mean

formulas.name: In-Stock Probability
formulas.formula: P(demand ≤ Q) = NORM.DIST(Q, μ, σ, TRUE)
formulas.description: Probability that all demand is satisfied (service level)

formulas.name: Service Level at Q*
formulas.description: At optimal order quantity, service level equals critical fractile

formulas.name: Out-of-Stock Probability
formulas.description: Probability of running out of inventory

formulas.name: Target Service Level Order Quantity
formulas.formula: Q = NORM.INV(target service level, μ, σ)
formulas.description: Order quantity needed to achieve target service level
